title: Remove vision board goal limit

requirements.text: Remove any hard-coded maximum cap on the number of goals a user can add in the Vision Board section, allowing unlimited goals to be created.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add more goals than any previously enforced limit in the Vision Board section
No error message, disabled state, or UI block appears when trying to add additional goals beyond any former cap
Existing goals are unaffected after the limit is removed
The 'Add Goal' button remains functional regardless of how many goals already exist

requirements.text: If the backend Motoko actor enforces a maximum number of vision board goals per user, remove or eliminate that cap so the backend accepts and stores an unlimited number of goals.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend accepts vision board goal additions beyond any previously enforced limit
No error or rejection is returned from the backend when adding goals above the former cap

constraints: Do not alter the data model or schema for vision board goals — only remove the count restriction
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Pagination or lazy loading of goals
Any UI redesign of the Vision Board page
Changes to other sections (journal, planner, etc.)
